strengths: Extensive 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Strong open-source contributions and entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective founder)
concerns: Limited explicit AI/ML expertise in resume (no advanced degrees or recognized AI products)
No direct experience with cloud platform strategy at scale
Lacks demonstrated products or platforms explicitly built with AI
response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering fundamentals and relevant experience in AI-adjacent infrastructure (agent workflows) and open-source leadership (GISCollective), but lacks explicit cloud platform strategy experience and recognized AI products. His entrepreneurial background is a plus, but the role requires deeper AI specialization than demonstrated.
